headline: Public Exam Pressure Linked to 2,300 Student Mental Health Cases
context: MOE crisis intervention data for 2025 recorded 2,300 student mental health emergencies during PT3 and SPM exam periods.

cards.big: 2,300 student mental health crises recorded during 2025 exam periods alone
cards.sub: Cases include self-harm panic attacks and suicidal ideation among teenagers

cards.big: Malaysian students rank 4th highest in OECD test anxiety index for 2025
cards.sub: Performance pressure correlates with single-exam-determines-future system design

cards.big: SPM results still determine 72% of university admission decisions as of 2026
cards.sub: High-stakes single examination creates extreme pressure on 17-year-olds

cards.big: Finland eliminated standardized testing until age 16 and leads global education outcomes
cards.sub: Continuous assessment reduces exam anxiety while improving learning quality

cards.big: An education system that damages mental health while measuring achievement has failed at both
Should Malaysia reduce SPM weight in university admissions and expand portfolio assessments
